verdicts.issue: minor: author 'Balso, Mike Del' should likely be 'Del Balso, Mike' (Italian surname particle); does not change citation rendering meaningfully

Could not verify existence of paper. Title 'Industrial AI and Vendor Lock-In: The Hidden Costs of Proprietary Ecosystems' by 'Sharma, Amit' in 'AI and Industry Review' vol 8 no 3 (2020) is not findable in any academic search; the journal 'AI and Industry Review' does not appear to exist. No DOI provided. Likely fabricated/hallucinated citation.

suggested_fix.note: Replace with a real citation on the same topic, or remove the citation and rephrase the prose. Renaming requires updating every [@sharma2020industrial] and @sharma2020industrial reference in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd

verdicts.issue: duplicate-of-other-entry: same paper as shazeer2017outrageously (Outrageously Large Neural Networks). Two entries point to same arXiv 1701.06538 / ICLR 2017 paper. This entry has the correct full author list.

author field wrong: 'Maziarz, Piotr and others' should be 'Maziarz, Krzysztof and Davis, Andy and Le, Quoc V. and Hinton, Geoffrey and Dean, Jeff'. The first name 'Piotr' is incorrect (correct is Krzysztof per arXiv:1701.06538 and ICLR 2017). Also 'and others' truncates the actual author list. Duplicate of shazeer_mixture_of_experts_2017.

suggested_fix.note: Either fix the author list to match the canonical {Shazeer, Noam and Mirhoseini, Azalia and Maziarz, Krzysztof and Davis, Andy and Le, Quoc V. and Hinton, Geoffrey and Dean, Jeff}, or consolidate with shazeer_mixture_of_experts_2017 (delete this entry, point all citations at the other). Renaming/deleting requires updating every [@shazeer2017outrageously] and @shazeer2017outrageously reference in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd

verdicts.issue: minor: author 'Engineering, Spotify' is reversed but corporate-author convention; should ideally be {Spotify Engineering}
duplicate-of-other-entry: same paper as strubell2019energy (both Strubell et al. 2019, ACL, DOI 10.18653/v1/p19-1355). Consider consolidating.
duplicate-of-other-entry: same paper as Strubell_2019. Consider consolidating to one canonical key.
duplicate-of-other-entry: same paper as tan2019efficientnet (both EfficientNet, Tan & Le, ICML 2019, PMLR v97). Consider consolidating; this entry lacks page numbers, the other has them.
duplicate-of-other-entry: same paper as Tan2019. Consider consolidating to one canonical key.

key year 2023 vs entry year 2022: paper appeared at ICML 2023 (PMLR v202:33921-33939); arXiv preprint is 2022. Within 1-year tolerance (preprint vs conference). Entry could be enriched with ICML venue/pages.

non-standard key 'TheBigHa77' (looks like a tool-generated stub key, not surname+year+topic). Suggest renaming to robertson2018bighack for consistency. Authors 'Robertson, J. and Riley, M.' should ideally use full first names per rule 4a (Jordan Robertson, Michael Riley).

suggested_fix.note: Renaming requires updating every [@TheBigHa77] and @TheBigHa77 reference in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd

verdicts.issue: minor: author 'Grid, The Green' is reversed; should be {The Green Grid}. No URL/DOI provided. The Green Grid is a real organization and the PUE/DCiE white paper does exist.

Could not confirm the DOI 10.1145/3580309 resolves to this exact paper. Author list 'Thompson, Neil and Spanuth, Tobias and Matthews, Hyrum Anderson' looks suspicious (real author of related Thompson papers is 'Svenja Spanuth' not 'Tobias Spanuth', and 'Hyrum Anderson Matthews' name structure is unusual). The widely-cited Thompson paper 'The Computational Limits of Deep Learning' (Thompson, Greenewald, Lee, Manso) is a different paper at IEEE Spectrum (already cited as thompson2021deep). A separate CACM 2023 paper by Thompson et al. on this topic may exist but author names should be verified.

suggested_fix.note: Verify DOI 10.1145/3580309 and correct the author list. If this paper does not exist, remove this entry and point citations at thompson2021deep instead.

verdicts.issue: Could not verify document existence. Title 'TSMC Arizona Fab 21 Water Usage Impact Assessment' published in 'Environmental Impact Report' is not findable; URL https://www.tsmc.com/english/dedicatedFoundry/manufacturing/arizona is a generic landing page, not a water-usage filing. TSMC has not published a document with this exact title at the Arizona Department of Water Resources (verified by web search). Also author 'Company, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing' is malformed (should be {Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company}). Likely fabricated citation.

suggested_fix.note: Replace with a real TSMC sustainability/ESG report or American Bar Association article on TSMC Phoenix water usage. Removing or renaming requires updating every [@tsmc2023water] and @tsmc2023water reference in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd

verdicts.issue: author field is corrupted: 'Un and Forum, World Economic' parses as two authors 'Un' and 'World Economic Forum' due to wrong BibTeX brace nesting. Should be '{UN E-Waste Coalition} and {World Economic Forum}' (or just '{World Economic Forum}'). The actual report is co-authored by UN E-Waste Coalition, WEF, PACE, and WBCSD.

suggested_fix.note: Fix author field to '{World Economic Forum} and {UN E-Waste Coalition}' (use brace-protected corporate names). No key rename needed.

verdicts.issue: key year 2020 vs entry year 2019: paper appeared at NeurIPS 2019 (volume 32). Within 1-year tolerance. Key naming inconsistent but entry is correct.

author field contains DBLP-style disambiguation tokens leaked into BibTeX: 'Wei, Jason and 0002, Xuezhi Wang and Schuurmans, Dale and Bosma, Maarten and Ichter, Brian and 0002, Fei Xia and Chi, Ed H. and Le, Quoc V. and Zhou, Denny'. The '0002, Xuezhi Wang' and '0002, Fei Xia' are DBLP author-ID disambiguation suffixes that should not appear in the rendered author list. Will render as '0002, Xuezhi Wang' surname='0002', firstname='Xuezhi Wang'.

suggested_fix.note: Strip the '0002, ' prefixes: author should be '{Wei, Jason and Wang, Xuezhi and Schuurmans, Dale and Bosma, Maarten and Ichter, Brian and Xia, Fei and Chi, Ed H. and Le, Quoc V. and Zhou, Denny}'. No key rename needed.

verdicts.issue: minor: key year 2016 vs entry year 2015 (within 1-year tolerance). Report is dated July 2015 per the note field; the key year may have been chosen based on a 2016 follow-up or publication date.

minor: title is just 'Roofline' with subtitle separately. Full title in CACM is 'Roofline: an insightful visual performance model for multicore architectures'. Currently OK but rendering may need title/subtitle merging.

minor: author 'on the Work of the Future, MIT Task Force' is malformed (should be '{MIT Task Force on the Work of the Future}' as corporate author with brace protection). Currently parses as surname='on the Work of the Future', given='MIT Task Force'.
non-standard key 'Wu2016' (no topic word, capitalized). Author uses 'and others' suffix; full author list should be expanded per rule 4a if known. Suggest renaming to wu2016gnmt for clarity.

suggested_fix.note: Renaming requires updating every [@Wu2016] and @Wu2016 reference in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd. Also expand 'and others' to full author list (Wu, Schuster, Chen, Le, Norouzi, Macherey, Krikun, Cao, Gao, Macherey, et al.).

verdicts.issue: minor: author uses 'and others' suffix; should be expanded per rule 4a. Title casing 'ai' should be 'AI' (title-protected as {AI}).

author field contains DBLP-style disambiguation tokens leaked into BibTeX: 'Xiao, Guangxuan and 0002, Ji Lin and Seznec, Mickaël and Wu, Hao and Demouth, Julien and 0003, Song Han'. The '0002, Ji Lin' and '0003, Song Han' are DBLP author-ID disambiguation suffixes. Will render with surname '0002' and given name 'Ji Lin'.

suggested_fix.note: Strip the '0002, ' and '0003, ' prefixes: author should be '{Xiao, Guangxuan and Lin, Ji and Seznec, Mickaël and Wu, Hao and Demouth, Julien and Han, Song}'. No key rename needed.
